de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer, ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicObject
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    public static class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject
extends SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
implements ISymbolicObject
    An implementation of ISymbolicObject which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

      • getAssociation

        public ISymbolicAssociation getAssociation(IProgramVariable programVariable,
                                           boolean isArrayIndex,
                                           Term arrayIndex,
                                           Term condition)
        Returns the ISymbolicAssociation with the given IProgramVariable.
        Specified by:
        getAssociation in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
        Parameters:
        programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicAssociation is requested.
        isArrayIndex - Is array index?
        arrayIndex - The array index.
        condition - The optional condition under which this association is valid.
        Returns:
        The found ISymbolicAssociation or null if no ISymbolicAssociation is available with the given IProgramVariable.

      • getValue

        public ISymbolicValue getValue(IProgramVariable programVariable,
                               boolean isArrayIndex,
                               Term arrayIndex,
                               Term condition)
        Returns the ISymbolicValue with the given IProgramVariable.
        Specified by:
        getValue in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
        Parameters:
        programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicValue is requested.
        isArrayIndex - Is array index?
        arrayIndex - The array index.
        condition - The optional condition under which this value is valid.
        Returns:
        The found ISymbolicValue or null if no ISymbolicValue is available with the given IProgramVariable.
